holdings.infoBox: DRGN is an equity ETF with a total of 26 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Themes China Generative Artificial Intelligence ETF (DRGN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the BITA China Generative AI Select index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of Chinese companies which derive significant revenue from generative artificial intelligence-related activities. DRGN was launched on Jul 15, 2025 and is issued by Themes.
